original_code:
module TopModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    input wire [7:0] temp_in,
    output reg [7:0] temp_out
);
    parameter OFFSET = 8'd5; // Calibration offset

    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            temp_out <= 8'b0;
        end else begin
            temp_out <= temp_in + OFFSET;
        end
    end
endmodule
